nasb.text: Keep watching and praying that you may not enter into temptation; the spirit is willing, but the flesh is weak.”

esv.text: Watch and pray that you may not enter into temptation. The spirit indeed is willing, but the flesh is weak.”

cnv.text: 應當警醒、禱告，免得陷入試探；你們心靈雖然願意，肉體卻是軟弱的。”

ccb.text: 你们要警醒祷告，免得陷入诱惑。你们的心灵虽然愿意，肉体却很软弱。”

csbs.text: 要警醒祷告，免得陷入试探。你们心灵虽然愿意，肉体却是软弱的。”
